_comment: Hand-entered overrides for films where Wikipedia scraping produces wrong data (franchise disambiguation, prose-only articles, etc.). Applied AFTER the merge step in apply-nominations.mjs so these always win.

king-kong-1933._note: 1933 King Kong received ZERO Oscar nominations — it predates the Visual Effects (1939) and Documentary (1942) categories. Parser mis-associated 2005 remake data via the shared article/disambiguation page.

alien-1979._note: Alien (1979) was nominated for Art Direction and Visual Effects; won VFX. Parser pulled the franchise accolades page which includes Aliens-1986 techs (Film Editing, Sound, Sound Editing, Score).
